description:
As the Bo District Health Information Officer, analyze the immunization completion performance for 2023.

Create an indicator named 'Full Immunization Dropout Rate' of type Percentage (factor 100), where the numerator computes (Penta 1 doses given minus Fully immunized children) and the denominator is Penta 1 doses given. This measures the proportion of children who started but did not complete the full immunization schedule.

Build a pivot table named 'Bo Facility Immunization Analysis 2023' showing Penta 1 doses given, Fully immunized children, and the Full Immunization Dropout Rate indicator for all individual health facilities under Bo District, broken out by the four quarters of 2023 (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4). Save as a favorite.

Export the pivot table data as CSV to /home/ga/Downloads/. Write /home/ga/Desktop/dropout_report.txt containing: (a) the total number of health facilities shown in the table, (b) the number of facilities where the Q4 2023 dropout rate exceeds 50%, (c) the name of the facility with the highest Q4 2023 dropout rate, and (d) whether the overall Bo District dropout trend improved or worsened from Q1 to Q4 2023.

Login credentials: admin / district

metadata.task_focus: indicator creation, multi-dimensional analytics, data interpretation
